prompt: Edit image 1 by replacing the dollar sign next to the "Current Balance" with the Bitcoin symbol from image 2. Add the green checkmark from image 3 next to the “$972 Actual” value in the Expenses section to indicate it’s verified. Keep layout and all original values unchanged
prompt_refined: Perform image editing on image 1. Replace the dollar sign ($) located to the left of '$24,847 Current Balance' with a white Bitcoin symbol extracted from image 2. Additionally, insert the green checkmark from image 3 to the right of the '$972 Actual' value within the 'Expenses' section, indicating it is verified. Maintain the original layout and all other numerical values in image 1.
objects: White Bitcoin symbol to the left of '$24,847 Current Balance'
Green checkmark to the right of '$972 Actual'
Expenses section with '$972 Actual' and '$1,429 Planned'
Income section with '$1,751 Actual' and '$3,836 Monthly Income'
Goal (3) section with '$0 Save' and '$35,962 Total Amount'
Finance app title and navigation bar
